questions.question: Who led the Paika rebellion against the British in 1817?
questions.explanation: Buxi Jagabandhu led the Paika rebellion against the British in 1817, which was one of the earliest rebellions against British rule in India.

questions.question: Who was the founder of the Gajapati dynasty in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Kapilendra Deva was the founder of the Gajapati dynasty in Odisha, ruling from 1435 to 1466 and establishing the dynasty's power and influence in the region.
